sections.heading: Why Care & Repair
sections.content: Breakdown support when you need it. Whether it's a fault or electrical problem - if your tech breaks down, we'll fix it. The 7 Day Fix Promise ensures that if it takes more than 7 calendar days, you can request a replacement. If we can't repair it, we'll give you an Electriz gift card to replace it. If your tech has already had two repairs and breaks down again, you can ask for a replacement. No extra costs for parts, labour, and call outs!

sections.heading: Price breakdown
sections.content: Care & Repair offers a variety of plans to support your product for a set period of time - 2, 3 or 5 years. You can also set up a monthly direct debit, which can be canceled at any time. Benefits vary by product category.

sections.heading: Offers
sections.content: Save with our latest Care & Repair offers. Unmissable offers are available to keep your tech amazing!

faqs.question: Why Care & Repair?
faqs.answer: Care & Repair provides support in the event of unexpected mechanical or electrical breakdown affecting the product's operation.

faqs.question: What is the 7 Day Fix Promise?
faqs.answer: If it takes us more than 7 calendar days to repair your product, you can request a replacement.

faqs.question: How long after buying a product do I have to take out a Care & Repair?
faqs.answer: Care & Repair can be offered in-store for products up to 12 months old, provided they are fully functional.

faqs.question: Can I pay in instalments?
faqs.answer: Yes, for Pay Monthly plans, a direct debit runs continuously until canceled, or upfront plans can be paid in full or over 10 instalments.

faqs.question: Are there any excess charges?
faqs.answer: No, no additional charges are associated with Care & Repair plans.
